name: Barbell Bench Press
instructions: Lie flat on the bench with your feet planted firmly on the floor.
Grip the bar just outside shoulder-width with an overhand grip.
Unrack the bar and position it over your chest with arms fully extended.
Lower the bar slowly to your mid-chest, keeping elbows at roughly 45 degrees.
Press the bar back up explosively until your arms are fully extended.
Repeat for the prescribed number of reps, then re-rack the bar.

gymbuddy.progressionNote: Add 2.5kg when you complete all reps for 2 sessions in a row
